Instructions.Saadiyat Lagoons HSE Scoring Template -: Use Weekly_Inspections as the response/master record after upload to Google Sheets. Users should complete only visible columns; hidden columns and dashboards update automatically.
2. Complete the visible input columns only. Hidden columns calculate automatically.
3. Score each KPI from 0 to 5. 0 = collapse of control, 5 = excellent sustained control.
4. Package and Cluster are mandatory. Contractor and responsible team auto-populate.
5. Weekly_Dashboard is for top management review. Monthly_Dashboard tracks recognition trend.
6. Gap_Analysis and CAPA_Tracker are for close-out management.

Cluster_Master.Cluster Master Register: Reference data used for package/cluster selection and automatic population of contractor and leadership accountability details.

KPI_Weights.KPI Weights and Gate Rules: Weights sum to 100%. Critical gate KPIs trigger a red flag if scored 0 or 1 in any inspection.

KPI_Weights: Primary fall prevention and work at height control
Continuity and quality of edge protection
Exclusion zones, toe boards, debris/tool control
Barricading, access, services, support, spoil setback
Tagging, inspection, full planking, access, stability
Valid PTW, correct scope, signatories, controls
Physical field verification before permit approval
Lift plan, appointed person, exclusion, rigging
Cleanliness, stacking, access routes, slip/trip control
Fire points, extinguishers, hot work readiness
Temporary power, RCD, condition of tools/cables

Lookups.Lookup Lists: Lists used for dropdowns in the Weekly_Inspections and CAPA_Tracker sheets.

Weekly_Inspections.Weekly Inspection Entry Sheet - Google F: Complete only visible fields. Use the 0-5 dropdown for each KPI. Package and Cluster auto-fill contractor leadership and the dashboard updates automatically.

Weekly_Dashboard.Weekly Dashboard: Set the control week and month in blue-font cells. This sheet summarizes weekly and current month performance by cluster and highlights weak KPIs / root causes.

Gap_Analysis.Gap Analysis: Use the control week and month to identify recurring gaps, weak KPIs and likely root causes. This supports weekly corrective and preventive action planning.

Monthly_Dashboard.Monthly Dashboard: Set the selected month and previous month in blue-font cells. Use this view for monthly recognition and improvement review.

CAPA_Tracker.Corrective and Preventive Action (CAPA): Automated from Weekly_Inspections. Each inspection row with a recorded gap/action appears here automatically. Close Date can be updated manually if you want to mark an action closed.

April.April 2026 | 09:00-11:00 | 3 Simultaneou: Tuesday = Package 3 only | Thursday = Package 2 & 4 only | Other days = mixed packages
